# pexip_infinity_ldap_role (Resource)

Manages an LDAP role with the Infinity service. LDAP roles map LDAP groups to Pexip roles for authentication and authorization management.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_ldap_role" "example" {
  name          = "LDAP Admin Role"
  ldap_group_dn = "cn=pexip-admins,ou=groups,dc=example,dc=com"
  role          = pexip_infinity_role.example.id
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ldap_group_dn` (String) The distinguished name (DN) of the LDAP group.
- `name` (String) The name of the LDAP role. Maximum length: 250 characters.

### Optional

- `roles` (Set of String) List of role URIs associated with this LDAP role mapping.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the LDAP role
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the LDAP role
